hook: AI gave you a 7-step framework when you just needed a yes or no.
caption:
AI gave you a 7-step framework when you just needed a yes or no.

This is the thing nobody talks about.

When you ask AI a question, it doesn't know if you're the kind of person who wants the full breakdown — or the kind of person who needs the answer in one sentence so you can move.

So it guesses. And it usually guesses wrong.

The overthinker gets bullet points when they needed someone to just decide for them.

The big-picture person gets granular detail when they needed the concept.

The executor gets "here are some things to consider" when they needed a checklist.

It's not that the AI is bad at answering questions.

It's that it doesn't know how YOUR brain processes information.

BootFile fixes this. It builds a profile of how you actually think — your pace, your depth preference, your decision style — and feeds that context to AI before you even ask your first question.

So instead of getting the generic 7-step framework response...

You get the answer shaped for the way your brain works.

There's a difference between AI that's smart and AI that knows you.

Link in bio to build yours.
